composition_ready_reason: 0 BLOCKERs. COMP-001 resolved — AI% at 75% limit (S007 and S024 real images downloaded). Remaining: 2 HIGH issues (COMP-006 timeline, COMP-007 community_guidelines_review). Further AI% improvement to 60% pending S001/S008/S020 legal review or paid stock.

creator_anh_duy.notes: Fact-based storytelling, respectful tone, curiosity over fear — all substantially met. AI% now at 75% limit (compliant after FIX-H1 Round 3). Remaining deduction: hook atmospheric-only framing (60s vs 30s target).

platform_youtube_long_form.notes: Duration (12 min) and aspect ratio (16:9) correct. THUMB_A selected (pending design). TITLE_A selected. TITLE_C approved as A/B candidate. Remaining deductions: chapter markers not assembled (requires timeline), community_guidelines_review pending.

audience_general.notes: Script in conversational desu/masu register. Cultural context provided in ACT_I. Terminology mostly accessible. Minor technical vocabulary (鉄筋コンクリート, 採掘権) present but contextually clear.

genre_documentary.notes: 13 verified facts (VF001-VF013). Disputed content explicitly flagged (L016). Emotional arc clear. AI% now compliant at 75% (FIX-H1 Round 3). Remaining deduction: 3 scenes (S001/S008/S020) still AI — completion to 60% pending legal/paid stock.

genre_mystery.notes: Evidence-first structure (ACT_II), uncertainty acknowledged (L016), open question ending (L034). Deduction: hook is 60s vs 30s target; central mystery question not explicitly posed within first 30 seconds.

modifier_japan.notes: Strongest dimension. Japanese naturalness, Ma beat (S022, 40s, correct), canonical place names, sensitive history handled carefully, Japanese sources cited, FIX-B1 removed sensational title.

modifier_lost_place.notes: Establishing shots present, map present, before/after contrast present, abandonment atmosphere. Deductions: opening motion mismatch (S001 slow vs very_slow), BEAT_LP_03 gap (no contemplative exterior without narration distinct from Ma beat).

issues.description: Current AI image usage is 85% of total video duration (610s of 720s). Composed template hard limit is 75% (540s max). Overage: 70 seconds of AI-generated imagery must be replaced with real footage or motion graphics.
issues.fix: FIX-H1 Round 3 applied. S007 (C007-A, CC BY 2.0, 1600x1200) and S024 (C024-B, Japan Govt 1974, cropped 1900x1069) downloaded and registered. ai_generate_count: 17→15. AI%: 85%→75% (at limit). Remaining: S001/S008/S020 pending CC BY-SA legal review or paid stock brings AI% to 60%.
issues.resolution: S007 and S024 real images downloaded and registered in image_plan.json. AI% reduced from 85% to 75% (exactly at contract limit). COMP-001 resolved. Further reduction to 60% pending Decision A (legal review) or Decision B (paid stock) for S001/S008/S020.

issues.description: No thumbnail concept has been selected. selected_concept_id is null. YouTube requires a thumbnail for all published videos. The pre-publish gate (C07) also blocks on this field.
issues.fix: Complete THUMB_A respect_check, then set selected_concept_id='THUMB_A' and status='approved'. THUMB_A is the recommended concept.

issues.description: respect_check = false on all thumbnail concepts (THUMB_A, THUMB_C). Composed template requires respect_check = true before any concept can be approved. This blocks COMP-002.
issues.fix: Human producer must review THUMB_A: (1) Does it sensationalize? (2) Does it imply false certainty about the island's history? (3) Does it respect the victims of forced labor? Then set respect_check=true and respect_check_notes. Do the same for THUMB_C if it is to be considered.

issues.description: THUMB_C title overlay '軍艦島：なぜ一夜で捨てられた島と呼ばれるのか' references the '一夜で捨てられた' (abandoned in one night) framing even as a question. Even as a rhetorical question this risks validating the myth. The actual departure took 3 months (Jan 15 – Apr 20, 1974). This is already tracked as W007.
issues.fix: Revise THUMB_C title to remove '一夜で捨てられた' framing entirely. Replace with factually accurate phrasing, e.g. '軍艦島：なぜ人々は消えたのか' or similar. Do not use THUMB_C until revised.

issues.description: selected_title_id is null. No title has been finalized. TITLE_A is approved but not selected. TITLE_C has pending factual, off_limits, and respect checks.
issues.fix: Set selected_title_id='TITLE_A' immediately (all checks passed). Complete TITLE_C checks as a parallel task for A/B test consideration.

issues.description: Stage 40: Rough v1 rendered 720s (V1 raw). Stage 42: 0.90x audio complete. Stage 43: V3 Tight Cut plan complete — target 556s (9:16), Ma beat 17s at 8:22-8:39. Render command: python tools/render/render_rough_video.py --timeline data/timeline_assembly_plan_v3_tight.json --output export/rough/hashima_rough_v3_tight.mp4. Chapter markers CH001-CH006 require final V3 timecodes after render.
issues.fix: Render V3 tight. Human review rough V3 (production/rough_v3_tight_cut_plan_report.md checklist). Confirm CH001-CH006 chapter timecodes align with V3 positions and update YouTube description after fine cut.

issues.description: community_guidelines_review is 'pending'. The video contains sensitive_topics: forced_labor, historical_violence, political_dispute. YouTube requires sensitive content to be reviewed and declared before publishing. The content_declaration is present and well-formed, but the review itself has not been completed.
issues.fix: Human producer must complete community guidelines review. The content_declaration in seo.json provides the basis for the declaration. Set community_guidelines_review='approved' when done.

issues.description: TITLE_C '廃墟島・端島（軍艦島）はなぜ捨てられた？世界遺産の闇と光' has factual_accuracy_check=false, off_limits_check=false, respect_check=false. The word '闇' (darkness) requires respect review — while metaphorical, it could be perceived as sensationalizing the forced labor history.
issues.fix: Complete all 3 checks for TITLE_C. Pay specific attention to '闇と光' phrasing relative to forced labor history. Cannot use as A/B title until all checks pass.

issues.description: Template hook target is 30 seconds (arc.hook.target_duration_percent = 5% of 720s = 36s). The current HOOK section runs 60 seconds (0:00–1:00). Additionally, no explicit investigative question is posed within the first 30 seconds — L001-L003 are atmospheric scene-setting rather than a direct mystery question. BEAT_MYS_01 requires the mystery to be clearly posed within 30 seconds.
issues.fix: Content issue — do not rewrite. Report only. Human producer should evaluate whether the atmospheric approach is intentional (aligns with Japan modifier's very_slow pacing principle) or whether it risks viewer drop-off in the critical 30-second window. Consider adding an explicit mystery question as L003.5 or revising L003 from 'すべてが消えました' to a question form.

issues.description: Opening scene S001 uses 'slow_pan_right'. The composed template requires opening_motion: 'very_slow_pan_right' and the emotional_motion_map entry 'wide_establishing' also maps to 'very_slow_pan_right'. This is a metadata-only field — no visual content change required, only the motion_direction label.
issues.fix: METADATA-SAFE FIX: Change scene.json S001.motion_direction from 'slow_pan_right' to 'very_slow_pan_right'. This instructs the compositor to apply a slower pan speed. No image regeneration needed.

issues.description: BEAT_LP_03 requires a wide or aerial exterior shot with minimal or no narration — distinct from the Ma beat (BEAT_JPN_02). S022 (Ma beat) satisfies BEAT_JPN_02 but cannot double as BEAT_LP_03. S020 is extreme_wide_shot but has active narration (L027). S024 is extreme_wide_shot with narration (L033-L034). No scene currently qualifies as a narration-free or minimal-narration contemplative exterior distinct from S022.
issues.fix: Content issue — do not rewrite. Report only. Consider extending S020 or S024 to have a brief narration-free segment, or adding a dedicated 15-20 second contemplative exterior cutaway. This beat adds emotional breathing space aligned with the lost_place modifier's atmosphere philosophy.

issues.description: Timed read-through has not been completed. This is FIX-M3. Voice talent session cannot be booked until the timed read-through confirms the script runs 12 minutes ±30 seconds at target pace.
issues.fix: Complete timed read-through at deliberate_slow pace. Target: 12 min ±30 sec. Update voice.json: timed_readthrough_completed=true with notes.

issues.description: Vbee TTS export complete. 28/28 audio segments exported to audio/vbee_raw/. This project uses TTS (not human voice talent). Human listening review of L001/L003/L008/L013/L014/L028 is the next gate. See audio/vbee_raw/vbee_full_export_qa.json.
issues.fix: Complete human listening review (see voice_asset_status.human_listening_pending). If pacing accepted, proceed to COMP-006 (timeline assembly). If pacing too fast, re-export slow/very_slow segments with INCLUDE_SPEED=true.

issues.description: S011a (IMG009) is flagged MANDATORY_HUMAN_REVIEW for sensitive content (coal mine tunnel evoking forced labor + AI_GENERATE). This is FIX-M1. The scene must be reviewed before image generation to ensure it does not visually approach graphic suffering, human depiction, or sensationalization of forced labor conditions.
issues.fix: Human producer reviews S011a visual_description and PROMPT_008. Confirm: (1) No human figures present, (2) Tunnel aesthetic does not sensationalize labor conditions, (3) Scene is clearly observational not sensational. Sign off in image_plan.json IMG009.human_review_status.

issues.description: Subtitle file has placeholder entry only (W003). Subtitles are recommended (not required) per platform profile but strongly recommended for Japanese-language content about sensitive history.
issues.fix: Generate subtitles after voice recording is complete. Auto-generated subtitles via YouTube are available but manual review recommended given forced labor historical content.

issues.description: S016 is a close-up of abandoned personal items: child's shoe, photograph, rusted can. The visual_description says 'evidence of hasty departure' (documentary framing) but the shot is a dedicated close-up on personal belongings. The composed template forbids 'personal_belongings_aestheticized_as_props'. The scene notes do enforce 'no identifiable faces in photographs' — showing awareness. This is a borderline case.
issues.fix: Content issue — do not rewrite. Human review of the generated image (when produced): confirm the items appear as historical artifacts rather than cinematic decoration. Narration context (L020: 'last residents boarded a ship') provides documentary framing. If generated image feels exploitative, replace with a wide shot that includes personal items in context rather than isolated close-up.

issues.description: S002 and S008 use 'ken_burns_zoom_in'. This value is a valid enum but is not in the composed template's preferred_motion_directions list. It is also not in forbidden_motion_directions or forbidden_in_emotional_moments. Minor preference violation only.
issues.fix: Optional: change S002 and S008 to 'slow_zoom_in' (preferred) at compositor discretion. Not a content issue.

issues.description: The project uses 6 sections (ACT_IV added for Ma Beat and UNESCO content) while the composed template defines 5 minimum required sections. Having more sections is not a violation. However, BEAT_JPN_02 section_hint = 'ACT_III' while the Ma beat is in ACT_IV in the project. This is a documentation mismatch, not a compliance failure.
issues.fix: INFO-level alignment fix: no content change needed. Accept ACT_IV as a permitted extension of the minimum section structure. Document in migration_notes.md that the project's ACT_IV corresponds to the template's ACT_III synthesis role.

issues.description: story.json references 'japan_template' as the outline template. This is the pre-architecture system reference. The template_compliance checks are also from the legacy system (4 beats vs 15 required by composed template).
issues.fix: Metadata-only: update story.json outline.template from 'japan_template' to 'japan_mystery_lost_place'. Update template_compliance block to reference the composed template beats and new compliance results. This is bookkeeping only — the content itself is compliant.

issues.description: L011: '映画のロケ地のモデルとされ' (said to be the model for a movie location) has no fact_id reference. This is a commonly cited cultural claim about Hashima's influence on post-apocalyptic film aesthetics, but no source is cited in research.json.
issues.fix: Either add a source to research.json and reference it in L011, or reframe the claim as 'しばしばそう言われています' (it is often said) to clearly mark it as widespread cultural perception rather than a specific documented claim.

issues.description: The _composition_metadata block was successfully removed from the composed template in Phase 3 Task 1. Metadata is now canonical in composition/manifests/japan_mystery_lost_place_manifest.json. Schema validation should now pass without additionalProperties:false exception.
issues.fix: None — resolved.

issues.actual_value: Ma beat is in project section ACT_IV
issues.description: The composed template defines BEAT_JPN_02.section_hint='ACT_III' but the project places the Ma beat (S022) in section ACT_IV. The beat is correctly implemented (40s, static, no narration) — only the section label differs. ACT_IV functionally corresponds to the template's ACT_III synthesis role.
issues.fix: No action required. Document in migration_notes.md.

issues.description: TTS speaking_rate=0.875 is not validated against any composed template constraint. The composed template defines pacing as 'very_slow' but does not specify a speaking_rate value. The rate appears reasonable for deliberate_slow Japanese narration. No action required.
issues.fix: No action required. Note for future template versions: add optional tts_speaking_rate_guidance field to narrator_guidance.

vbee_callback_payload_fix.problem: 400 Validation Failed — callbackUrl is required in every Vbee TTS request
vbee_callback_payload_fix.root_cause: Vbee API is async — requires callback URL for audio delivery. Payload was missing the field.
changes: _require_callback_url() guard added — aborts before API call if not set
_call_vbee() returns ('audio', bytes) or ('pending', dict) — async response handled
print_config() shows callback URL (set yes/no) and callback field name
run_auth_test() validates callback URL before call, shows URL in output
Manifest adds callback_field, callback_url_set, pending_async_segments fields
